scripts.docker:run: docker run --rm -it -p 3870:3000 -v sentinello-data:/app/data -v sentinello-nvm:/home/sentinello/.nvm --name sentinello walkofcode/sentinello:dev
scripts.demo:up: pnpm docker:build && docker run --rm -it -p 3870:3000 -v sentinello-data:/app/data -v sentinello-nvm:/home/sentinello/.nvm -v "$(pwd)/demo-projects:/roots/demo:ro" --name sentinello walkofcode/sentinello:dev

overridesNotes.postcss@<8.5.10: GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 XSS via unescaped </style> in stringify. next 16.2.x still pins postcss 8.4.31 exactly; next 16.3-canary has adopted 8.5.10 so Vercel itself considers this combination safe. Remove when next 16.3 stable lands.
overridesNotes.brace-expansion@>=5.0.0 <5.0.6: GHSA-jxxr-4gwj-5jf2 / CVE-2026-45149 DoS via large numeric range expansion. Remove when @typescript-eslint's minimatch chain resolves brace-expansion >=5.0.6 naturally.
overridesNotes.@esbuild-kit/core-utils>esbuild: GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99 esbuild dev-server CVE. @esbuild-kit/core-utils only calls esbuild.transform()/transformSync()/version (never serve()/build()/context()), so 0.18.20 -> 0.25.12 is safe for the TS-config-loading path drizzle-kit uses. Remove when drizzle-kit 1.0 stable drops @esbuild-kit/* entirely.
